name: Retently NPS and Customer Feedback API
what_it_does: NPS (Net Promoter Score), CSAT, and CES survey platform with REST API — enabling customer success teams to automate customer feedback collection across email, in-app, and SMS channels, track loyalty scores over time, trigger follow-up actions based on survey responses, and integrate feedback with CRM and helpdesk systems.
use_cases: Automating NPS surveys via Retently API for customer lifecycle touchpoints
Triggering CSAT surveys via Retently API after support ticket closure
Syncing NPS scores via Retently API to CRM for customer health scoring
Creating customer segments based on NPS responses via Retently for retention campaigns
Monitoring real-time NPS trends via Retently API for customer success dashboards
not_for: General market research surveys (use SurveyMonkey or Typeform for broader surveys)
Large-scale anonymous surveys without customer identity tracking (Retently is customer-specific)
B2B sales pipeline feedback (Retently is post-sale customer success focused)
best_when: A SaaS or subscription business needs automated NPS/CSAT/CES feedback loops — where Retently collects, tracks, and routes customer feedback to CS teams with CRM integration.
avoid_when: You need general market research, one-time surveys, or anonymous feedback without customer identity.

auth.notes: API key via HTTP Bearer token. API key from Retently account settings. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes. Webhooks for survey response events. REST API for contact management, campaign triggering, and response retrieval.

pricing.paid_tiers: Small Business $49/month (1,000 surveys/month); Growth $149/month (5,000 surveys); Premium $299/month (20,000 surveys); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Moldovan company (Chișinău). Founded 2014 by Dan Nour and Anastasia Samus. Bootstrapped. NPS-focused from the start. 500+ customers. Used by: SaaS companies, subscription businesses. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Intercom, Zendesk, Slack, Zapier. Email and in-app survey types. Response tagging and categorization (NPS reason codes). Follow-up automation (detractor workflow). Dashboard with NPS trends over time. Multi-language surveys. Smaller than Qualtrics but NPS-specialized.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with Bearer token. Webhooks. GDPR compliant. Moldovan company. No OAuth2. NPS/CSAT/CES specialized. Good integration ecosystem. 7-day free trial.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact reads idempotent by email. Campaign reads idempotent. Survey send triggers: check if customer already received survey before triggering. Response reads idempotent by response ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Contact email is primary key — create/update contacts before triggering surveys
Survey send rate limits apply — don't send same customer multiple surveys in short period
Webhook events for responses — implement idempotent response handlers (webhooks may retry)
Moldovan company — EU-adjacent; GDPR compliance for EU customer data
NPS scores are -100 to 100 (not 0-10 ratings) — convert correctly when syncing to CRM
Campaign vs one-time send — different API endpoints for recurring campaigns vs ad-hoc sends

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Moldovan company — EU-adjacent (Moldova not in EU but EU-oriented). Bearer token auth. No OAuth2 scope granularity. Customer feedback data (NPS scores, open-ended responses) is sensitive PII. US/EU data residency. Webhook delivery with signature validation.
